description: A thing made for a particular purpose; a mechanism or apparatus. 'Keli' names the crafted complexity—parts working together toward function.
sound_symbolism: The word clicks into place. 'Ke' marks with precision, mechanism defined. Then 'li' flows in function, parts moving smoothly.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'keli' (the device). More complex than 'tenoa' (tool)—a device has multiple parts working together.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Invention serving life—devices designed for repair, longevity, and genuine need.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Mechanism as craft—clockwork, looms, mills, each device understood by its maker.
